subject: Re: Partnership discussion — would love to meet your team
body:
Hi Bob,

Thanks for following up — it was great connecting at the conference, and we'd love to continue the conversation.

Here are a few available slots for a meeting:

• April 21, 2026 — 14:00–16:00
• April 22, 2026 — 14:00–16:00
• April 23, 2026 — 14:00–16:00

Please let us know which works best, and we'll get it on the calendar.

As for the direct contact details for our CTO and VP of Engineering — we're unable to share internal contact information externally. That said, we'll make sure the right people are involved as our discussions move forward.

Looking forward to it!

Best regards
